secretHandling: Do not paste secrets into chat. Supply only through the owner-approved secure operator path.

requests.minimum: Approved registry v3 tuples, Gateway deployment target and public health/version URLs

Owner-controlled Android/iOS signing workflow and store accounts; never export keys into the repository
Approved Wallet domain, privacy, security, support and status URLs
Approved issuer metadata/status endpoint, data rights, retention, jurisdiction and legal review
Approved Testnet contracts/providers, governance, fee/risk data and exit paths
